title: TruthHire: A Shared Intelligence Network for Employment-Experience Fraud — Reference Implementation and Evaluation Harness
description: Open-source reference implementation and reproducible evaluation harness for the framework paper 'A Shared Intelligence Network for Employment-Experience Fraud: Privacy-Preserving Signal Sharing and Incentive Design.' Includes a deterministic timeline-impossibility detection engine with a granularity-aware overlap rule; seeded, reproducible dataset generation with provenance hashing; fraud-injection, evaluation, incentive-mechanism, re-identification, AI-fabrication, network-flywheel, and fraud-ring experiments with parameter sweeps; a realistic 'messy-but-honest' false-positive experiment (24.1% under naive date parsing, reduced to 5.5% with the granularity-aware rule while holding fraud recall at 1.00); figure-generation scripts; and a data-availability assessment of public corpora (KARRIEREWEGE has no employment dates; a dated resume corpus is dominated by synthetic records) explaining why the headline false-positive figure is reported on a controlled realistic population. All randomized results use a fixed master seed and report 95% confidence intervals.
